title: Jassceram 10.5 Inch Dinner Plates, Ceramic Flat Plates for Dining and Kitchen, High Edge Modern Plates - Microwave, Oven and Dishwasher Safe, Scratch Resistant and Lead-Free, Set of 6, White, 27cm
features: Jassceram 10.5 Inch High Side Plate Set Debuts - White minimalist round design dinner plate set is eye-catching and looks stylish and wonderful on the dining table. White suits all decors, is classic and timeless.

Spill-Free Design - Each plate measures 10.5 x 10.5 x 1.15 inches, 0.86 kg. Ideal for table dining, parties or banquets and other occasions. These dinner plates have a lip around the edge to prevent food from escaping.
Pro-grade Ceramic Plates - Fired at high temperatures, it is more chip resistant and stronger than stoneware and melamine (safe temperature up to 500℉). Dishwasher, microwave, oven and freezer safe.

Easy to Clean and Stack - Our white dinner plates are stackable and don't take up a lot of space in your cupboard. The smooth surface makes it difficult for stains to remain, and it is easy to machine wash and hand wash.

SHARE THE FUN AND JOY WITH FAMILY AND FRIENDS - Jassceram Ceramic Plate Set is beautifully and safely packaged, making it a perfect giving for your family or friends. In addition, our dinner plate set is perfect for family dinners, housewarmings, wedding receptions, and restaurant openings.
description: Product Description Details Package Include: Dinner plates set of 6 Material: Porcelain Diameter: 27 cm/10.5 inch Height: 3 cm/1.2 inch Each Plate Weight: 0.86 kg/1.9 pounds Bearable temperature: from 0°F to 500°F Jassceram 10.5-Inch White Dinner Plates Collection Debuts! Create your perfect dinnerware set starting with the stunning Jassceram Dinner Plates. Bright and modern, our dinner plates bring classic style to kitchens and dining table. Clean, simple and beautifully balanced, it's the ideal blank canvas for your culinary creations. The 10.5-inch dinner plate is perfect for serving steaks, grilled chicken, pizza, salads, pasta, beans, entrees and more. Often used for family gatherings, banquet parties and restaurant services. Chip and Scratch Resistant Durable and Sturdy, Mircowave, Oven, Dishwasher and Freezer Safe Lead-free, Cadmium-free and Non-toxic Clean and Stack Easily, Take up Less Room Gifting Options for Housewarmings, Wedding Receptions, Mother's Day, Father's Day and Christmas. Stable Structure - Dual-ring design Innovative dual-ring base enhances load-bearing and anti-slip performance. The 10.5-inch white ceramic plate combines elegance and practicality—perfect for daily meals, gatherings, and versatile dining settings. Multi-purpose Plates Simple modern design and smooth white surface. Perfect for your daily meals and entertaining guests. Great for pasta, salads, steak, pizza, entrees and more Sturdy and Durable Plates Made of professional-grade ceramic, lead-free and cadmium-free. Fired at high temperature, it is more sturdy and durable. Safe in microwave, oven, dishwasher and freezer. Easy to Clean and Stack The surface of the plate does not absorb water easily, making it very easy to clean. You can hand wash with soap or place it in the dishwasher. Safe and easy stacking, saving space and improving space usage efficiency.
